{
  "name": "express-tailwind-starter",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/server.ts",
    "dev:css": "tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./src/public/styles.css -o ./src/public/tailwind.css --watch",
    "dev:all": "concurrently -k -n server,css -c blue,magenta \"npm:dev\" \"npm:dev:css\"",
    "prebuild": "npm run build:css",
    "build": "tsc",
    "postbuild": "copyfiles -u 1 src/public/** dist/public",
    "build:css": "tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./src/public/styles.css -o ./src/public/tailwind.css",
    "start": "node dist/server.js",
    "test": "jest"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "express": "^4.19.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/jest": "^29.5.12",
    "@types/node": "^20.11.30",
    "@types/supertest": "^2.0.16",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.19",
    "concurrently": "^8.2.2",
    "copyfiles": "^2.4.1",
    "jest": "^29.7.0",
    "postcss": "^8.4.38",
    "supertest": "^6.3.4",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.7",
    "ts-jest": "^29.1.2",
    "ts-node-dev": "^2.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.4.5"
  }
}

Tailwind OK

If this text is styled, Tailwind CSS compiled successfully.

# Express + Tailwind CSS Starter (Port 4445)

Run locally:

- Install: npm install
- Build Tailwind once: npm run build:css
- Dev (server + Tailwind watcher): npm run dev:all
- Open: http://localhost:4445

Production build:

- npm run build (prebuild compiles Tailwind, build compiles TS, postbuild copies public assets)
- npm start

Notes:

- Tailwind config scans ./src/public/**/*.{html,js,ts}
- CSS input: src/public/styles.css
- CSS output (served): src/public/tailwind.css
- Test page: src/public/index.html contains a styled element to verify Tailwind.

notes: Run `npm run build:css` at least once before visiting the page or use `npm run dev:all` to watch and compile Tailwind CSS while running the server.
Tests can be run with `npm test`. They verify the index page and Tailwind link are served.
